mainEntity.name: How do I know if my business is a good fit for Google Assistant optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: A strong sign is when Google can pull a clean, short answer from your page or business profile for common questions. If your content already ranks well, has clear headings, and matches how people speak, you usually have a better starting point.
acceptedAnswer.description: If Google can easily pull short answers from your site or profile, you’re a good fit. Clear headings, strong local data, and existing search visibility help most.
